vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách/tuổi thơ
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with assembling intricate LEGO structures for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: phương thức giải tỏa sáng tạo
vocab.example: Painting served as a vital creative outlet for me as a child, allowing me to express emotions I couldn't put into words.
I used to collect vintage stamps, fascinated by the history and stories from a bygone era.

vocab.meaning: học hay làm cái gì đó một cách nông nhiệt/không chuyên sâu
vocab.example: I used to dabble in various musical instruments, from the recorder to the harmonica, though I never mastered any.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không thể thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity about nature, I spent my weekends identifying different species of insects in the garden.

vocab.meaning: kỳ quái, lạ lùng nhưng theo cách đáng yêu
vocab.example: My favorite childhood pastime was writing whimsical stories about talking animals and enchanted forests.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Building model airplanes greatly improved my spatial awareness and hand-eye coordination at a young age.
Most of my hobbies were just fleeting interests, but my passion for drawing actually stuck with me into adulthood.
Playing chess provided the intellectual stimulation I craved during my summer breaks.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Finishing a thousand-piece jigsaw puzzle gave me an immense sense of accomplishment when I was ten.
